questionHtml: Sketch the graph of f on the grid below.
markschemeHtml:
A1A1A1

 

Note: Award A1 for a smooth concave down curve with generally correct shape. If first mark is awarded, award A1 for local maximum and x-intercept in approximately correct position, award A1 for endpoints at x=0 and x=3 with approximately correct y-coordinates.

 

[3 marks]
